name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
benefits: Income support of Rs 6,000 per year in three equal instalments for eligible farmer families.
application_steps: Check eligibility with local agriculture office or online portal
Complete Aadhaar and bank seeding
Submit land ownership or cultivation details
Track beneficiary status online

name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana
required_documents: Aadhaar card or approved identity proof
Ration card or family identity document
benefits: Cashless secondary and tertiary hospital care cover for eligible families at empanelled hospitals.
application_steps: Check family eligibility
Complete eKYC
Generate or update Ayushman card
Visit an empanelled hospital for cashless treatment

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban
required_documents: Property or land documents if applicable
benefits: Housing assistance or credit-linked subsidy for eligible urban households.
application_steps: Confirm income group and city eligibility
Apply through urban local body or portal
Submit identity, income, bank and property documents
Track application through the PMAY system

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana
benefits: Crop insurance protection against notified risks, weather events and yield losses.
application_steps: Check notified crops and cutoff dates
Enroll through bank, CSC or online portal
Pay farmer premium share
Report crop loss within required timelines

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
required_documents: Ration card or household composition proof
benefits: Deposit-free LPG connection support for eligible women from poor households.
application_steps: Confirm no existing LPG connection in household
Submit KYC to LPG distributor or online
Provide Aadhaar, bank and ration details
Receive LPG connection after verification

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
benefits: Monthly social assistance pension for eligible older citizens, with state top-ups where applicable.
application_steps: Apply through local panchayat, municipality or state social welfare portal
Submit age, income and bank documents
Complete verification
Track sanction and payment status

name: Kisan Credit Card
benefits: Flexible short-term credit for crop production and allied agricultural needs.
application_steps: Approach bank branch, CSC or online service
Submit KCC form with land or activity proof
Bank verifies limit and eligibility
Receive credit card or account limit

name: National Scholarship Portal Scholarships
required_documents: Caste or category certificate if applicable
benefits: Single-window application access for central and state scholarships for eligible students.
application_steps: Register on the National Scholarship Portal
Complete profile and bank validation
Select eligible scholarship scheme
Upload documents and submit before deadline
Track institute and department verification
